    - you don't wanna eat with me you ain't gotta seat with me
don't wanna play with me then you ain't gotta say with me
but can i continue then you can see if i offend you
i'm not trying to trick anything in you
you pick the menu the venue

- 02:22 pm, august 15th, 2021

        - i'm heading to cenote with my laptop in back pack
everybody knows me cuz i go their every day
exaggeration is ok because we're not the things we said
and we are not the things we've done
and we are not things we thought we would become
my dumb conservatism
is that i mostly prefer livin
despite all its absurdism
yoked up to that status quo
i want all the smoke. for now
some day i won't. then to relax and stop trying
now i'm crying cuz dad's dying
and i'm fine when i'm by him
but when i'm not which is often
i already miss him like i never ever have before
can't see past it, but that's the door
and it looks just like i always imagine
when i practice unmasking
which part of this am i asking for
to be beyond seeing
not a void a noise that appears
when i'm solo i don't pick what i'm hearing
i'm here in the flesh
say that with my chest
belly laugh blessed
fresh dressed
do our best
put our service to the test
for every guess
make it up after for the rest
hope floats for everyone
you can put it on my tab
i just hope everyone remembers you still gotta drive the car you came in
and i don't know how far your going so all i can say is

    - you don't need big words
but maybe not for the reasons you heard
the smallest you can hold is still a universe
worth of energy and entropy
you and a verse ain't enemies
you and the versions of you entering the ring
can dance an sing anything
and it slaps
let it ring
we clap for every ding

thoughts about slippery slope projections
        -  when someone calls something a slippery slope are they projecting their own inability to avoid that thought pattern
    - 01:12 pm, august 15th, 2021
notes on personal drama in public spaces
tags:
        -  when you look at a person and it calls you to think "i hope that person is ok"
            - that's no big issue if that easily dissipates into your  general hope for people's wellbeing without dramatically attaching to the person who just happened to trigger the chain of thoughts
            - but it gets to be a big problem quickly when dramatic attachment prevents you from moving on without engaging them in your drama
